urdu transliteration text:
Woh noor jisko shahe mashreqain kehte hai
Usi ko noor e khuda noor e ain kehte hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The light that we call the king of the east and the west. We call it the light of God and the light of our eyes

urdu transliteration text:
Bikhar gaya to wohi noor kaayinat bana
Simat gaya to usi ko Hussain kehte hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When it spread this light became the universe. When that light comes together it is known as Hussain

urdu transliteration text:
Hum Husain (A.S.) Waale Hain
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

english translation text:
This is our good fortune; We are the people of Hussain (A.S).
Ye humaari qismat hai, hum Husain (A.S.) waale Hain.

We are the lovers of Nabi (S.A.W), we are the lovers of Ali (A.S.)
Hum Nabi (S.A.W.) ke aashiq hai, hum Ali (A.S.) ke deewane

urdu transliteration text:
Aur Hassan (A.S.) se nisbat hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: And we are connected with Hassan (A.S.)

urdu transliteration text:
Hum se Fatema Zehra (A.S.), kar chuki hai ek waada: Ab humaari jannat hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Bibi Fatema (A.S.) has already made a promise to us: Paradise is now for us

urdu transliteration text:
Ya Ali (A.S.) ki midhat hai, Ya Husain (A.S.) ka maatam, Har nafas Ibaadat hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We praise Imam Ali (A.S.), we do maatam for Hussain (A.S.), Every breath of this is worship

urdu transliteration text:
Hum bataate dunya ko, hum se puchti dunya
Gham mein kitni lazzat hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We would tell the entire world, if only they asked us, How much pleasure is derived from lamenting (on Imam Hussain)

urdu transliteration text:
Khulq hai Murawwat hai Ilm o Fan hai Hikmat Hai, Khun mein sharaafat hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We are well mannered, courteous, knowledgeable, talented and wise, There is decency in our blood

urdu transliteration text:
SOCHA SAHIL PE YEH BEHRE AHLE HARAM
DOSH PAR RAKHKE YEH ALQAMA LE CHALO
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: He thought at the banks of river, for the sake of the families. Carry water on my shoulders and take me there…

urdu transliteration text:
AI ABAD MERI JANNAT HAI KARBOBALA
MERI MATTI ME HAI ISHQE AALE IBAA
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: O Abad (poet), my paradise is Karbobala. The love of Ahlul Bayt is deeply ground with my clay (essence)

urdu transliteration text:
KUCH NAI CHAYE MUJHKO USKE SIWAA
SUE DAAMANE AHLE KISA LE CHALO
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I don’t want anything besides, The presence of Ahle Kisa (the people of the cloak), so please take me there…
